use_when: Request help, overview, or usage instructions for this mols-kanban-markdown skill
excludes: Running specific board initializations, validations, or card movements directly

use_when: Initialize Kanban workspace directory with configuration files and default guides
excludes: General code changes or validating/moving existing cards

use_when: Validate the directory structure and existence of required configuration files
excludes: General code changes or card frontmatter validation

use_when: Run validation script for card YAML frontmatter validation and schema check
excludes: General code changes or initializing workspace

use_when: Move cards to target directories matching their status frontmatter and fix links
excludes: General code changes or verifying directory setup
